name: vtkpython-cbl

metadata.name: vtkpython-cbl
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A library of vtkpython tools for cardiac biomechanics.

documentation:
# vtkpython_cbl
A library of vtkpython tools for cardiac biomechanics.
## Installation
```
pip install vtkpython_cbl
```
